name: Blue Corn Muffins with Cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the dry ingredients: blue cornmeal, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the liquid ingredients: egg, egg white, milk, canola oil, honey or maple syrup, and cranberries.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined. The batter will be lumpy.
5. Grease a muffin tin with vegetable spray (or line with paper liners).
6. Fill each muffin cavity about 3/4 full with batter.
7. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Makes approximately 10 muffins (I got 11).
Per serving: 208 calories, 4g protein, 8g fat, 30g carbohydrates, 17mg cholesterol, 211mg sodium, 1g fiber.
